cases.prompt: Create an engineering triage report from this analyzed web UX findings summary and write it to web-ux-test/report.md.
cases.expected_output: A report organized by severity with evidence references, next actions, and regression-test candidates.
assertions: Separates confirmed findings from hypotheses and missing evidence.
Does not invent evidence or owners.

cases.prompt: Turn our ARIA snapshot review into an accessibility report for release signoff.
cases.expected_output: An accessibility-focused report covering semantic regressions, baseline risks, privacy issues, and required reviews.

cases.prompt: Run the browser test plan and collect findings.
cases.expected_output: The skill should not trigger; browser execution belongs to run-playwright-mcp-web-ux-test.
assertions: Does not use this skill for browser execution.
